home.heroTitle: Your Retreat in the Land of Gold Mines & Dairy Farms
home.heroSubtitle: Comfort and hospitality in Eldorado dos Carajás — where mining history meets the richness of the countryside.
home.highlightAmazonicaDesc: In the Carajás Mineral Province, among historic gold mines and pastures that feed the region.
home.highlightLocalizacaoDesc: In the center of Eldorado dos Carajás, close to mining companies, farms and everything you need.
home.highlightConfortoDesc: 46 air-conditioned apartments with full infrastructure for those who work or explore the region.
home.highlightCafeDesc: Complimentary buffet with authentic Pará flavors — from local dairy cheese to Amazonian fruits.
home.sobreTitle: Rest and Tradition in the Heart of Eldorado dos Carajás
home.sobreP1: Gaivota Hotel is the ideal base in one of Brazil's richest regions. Eldorado dos Carajás was born from the great gold mines and mining projects of Serra dos Carajás, and today it is also a reference for its strong agricultural production and dairy basins that sustain thousands of families.
home.sobreP2: We offer 46 air-conditioned apartments, covered parking, complimentary regional breakfast and a team that understands the needs of those who come for work in mining, farming or to experience the living history of this land.
home.acomodacoesTitle: Rooms for Those Who Live the Region
home.acomodacoesDesc: Accommodations designed for mining professionals, agribusiness workers and travelers who wish to explore the land of Carajás.
home.confortoItem1: Air conditioning and solar water heating
home.ctaTitle: Book Now in the Land of Carajás
home.ctaDesc: Contact us via WhatsApp and secure your stay in the heart of Eldorado dos Carajás.

quartos.heroSubtitle: Comfort and rest for those who work and explore the Carajás region
quartos.introText: Each room offers the rest you need after a day in mining, farming or exploring the region. Spacious, air-conditioned rooms equipped with solar water heating, mini-fridge and private bathroom. All rooms include regional breakfast with local products.
quartos.disclaimer: * Prices are for reference and may vary by season. No room has a safe.

contatos.heroSubtitle: Service for companies, professionals and travelers in the Carajás region

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Does Gaivota Hotel offer special conditions for mining and agribusiness companies?
faq.a1: Yes! We have differentiated and flexible conditions for corporate accommodation, serving mining, agriculture, logistics and other sectors operating in the Eldorado dos Carajás region. Contact us for customized solutions.
faq.q2: Is the hotel prepared to receive professionals working in mines and farms in the region?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Our accommodations offer maximum comfort and functionality for professionals working in the Carajás Mineral Province and dairy basin properties, with high-speed Wi-Fi, air-conditioned environments and a hearty breakfast.
faq.q3: What is the hotel's location relative to mining companies and rural areas?
faq.a3: We are in the center of Eldorado dos Carajás, with easy access to the main roads connecting mining areas, rural settlements and dairy basin farms. An ideal location for those who need mobility in the region.
faq.q4: Is breakfast included and suitable for those who need to start early for field or mining work?
faq.a4: Yes, our regional breakfast buffet is always included. We serve a complete, hearty breakfast with local products — including cheeses and dairy from the local basin — perfect for an intense workday.
faq.q5: Does the hotel offer secure parking for company vehicles and trucks?
faq.a5: Yes, we have ample covered and secure parking for 30 vehicles, including pickup trucks and utility vehicles common in mining and agricultural activities in the region.
faq.q6: How can I request a quote to host a team of employees?
faq.a6: For corporate quotes and reservations, contact us at (94) 99285-4456 or through our form. We serve mining, agribusiness and all sectors that drive Eldorado dos Carajás.

politica.heroSubtitle: Transparency and security for your stay in Eldorado dos Carajás
politica.intro: We value clarity in our policies. We recommend checking the specific conditions of each reservation when booking.
politica.cancelamento1: Free cancellation within 7 days after booking, in accordance with Brazilian law.
politica.crianca1: Children of all ages are welcome.
politica.crianca2: From 6 years old, charged as adults.
politica.petsMsg: Pets are not allowed on hotel premises.
politica.faturamentoDesc: Mining, agribusiness and other companies can opt for billing via bank slip (boleto). Contact us for more information.
